purpose: Greg-facing capability monitor for the core agent operations that fail when credentials, sessions, or vendor lanes decay.
defaultCadence: hourly lightweight probes; dashboard should show the newest event per capability

capabilities.label: Hub-QA
capabilities.userCapability: Detect Hub route, auth, and workflow regressions before Greg sees broken fleet or Cortex pages.
capabilities.authority: Hub-QA VM browser/session and production Hub routes
capabilities.freshnessTarget: 20h auth age max; 2h route smoke cadence
capabilities.warnWhen: auth age >= 20h, one sentinel route times out, or session age is unknown for 3 runs
capabilities.failWhen: auth redirect, login wall, 401/403, blank shell, or both sentinel routes fail
capabilities.renewalPath: Drive Hub-QA VM Chrome through Hub magic-link auth using Greg .com Gmail when needed
capabilities.proofRequired: Latest probe event, route screenshots on warn/fail, auth age if available

capabilities.label: LinkedIn Session
capabilities.userCapability: Keep LinkedIn/presence work ready without discovering login decay during a time-sensitive workflow.
capabilities.authority: LinkedIn-Session browser/cookie jar or a Hub presence route that performs real upstream validation
capabilities.freshnessTarget: validated daily while presence/content work is active
capabilities.warnWhen: cookie age unknown for 24h, last validation older than 7d, or one transient LinkedIn edge error
capabilities.failWhen: login wall, checkpoint, captcha, 999, account restriction, or upstream invalid result
capabilities.renewalPath: Human or approved browser-auth lane; never account recovery from monitor
capabilities.proofRequired: Non-posting validation result and observed auth surface classification

capabilities.label: Telegram Poller
capabilities.userCapability: Preserve Greg-visible agent/orchestrator messages and catch duplicate poller or wrong-bot routing before visibility goes dark.
capabilities.authority: Production Telegram bot API token and authoritative daemon poller
capabilities.freshnessTarget: 30m daemon health; immediate proof on route/token changes
capabilities.warnWhen: retry streak, webhook/poller ambiguity, unexpected bot username, or slow API response
capabilities.failWhen: 401/403 token invalid, sustained 409 conflict, no successful receive loop, or wrong bot/chat route
capabilities.renewalPath: Fix .env/script route or rotate token only after approval
capabilities.proofRequired: Redacted getMe/getChat/sendMessage with visible message_id for route changes

capabilities.label: Gmail Token
capabilities.userCapability: Read and send approved Greg .com vendor email without accidentally falling back to the wrong account.
capabilities.authority: Gmail API OAuth token for the workflow's required account
capabilities.freshnessTarget: daily plus before any approved external email task
capabilities.warnWhen: token works but account is unexpected, refresh age unknown for 24h, or quota warnings appear
capabilities.failWhen: invalid_grant, 401/403, refresh failure, or profile cannot be read
capabilities.renewalPath: OAuth re-consent for the required account; do not send from fallback account
capabilities.proofRequired: Expected emailAddress, token probe timestamp, and thread/message id after approved sends

capabilities.label: Orgo VM Exec
capabilities.userCapability: Know which VM lanes are actually usable before assigning browser, computer-use, or vendor-recovery work.
capabilities.authority: Orgo API/VM ledger for the assigned workspace/lane
capabilities.warnWhen: one transient 5xx, stale lease metadata, VM listed but slow/unready, or lane mismatch
capabilities.failWhen: 401/403, endpoint unreachable, VM stuck/deleted while marked active, or repeated 5xx
capabilities.renewalPath: Vendor support or VM recreation workflow; preserve lane authority in VM ledger
capabilities.proofRequired: Per-lane inventory id, exec status, and blocker class when vendor/human action is required

capabilities.label: GitHub Token
capabilities.userCapability: Keep repo automation, PR verification, and deployment-adjacent checks from failing mid-task.
capabilities.authority: GitHub API token used by automation for the relevant org/repo scope
capabilities.warnWhen: remaining quota below 20%, scopes missing for non-critical path, or secondary rate-limit warning
capabilities.failWhen: 401/403, SSO authorization missing, target repo inaccessible, or critical bucket exhausted
capabilities.renewalPath: Token refresh or SSO authorization by token owner
capabilities.proofRequired: Rate-limit headers, target repo access result, and reset time
capabilities.observed: Authenticated as revopsglobal; scopes=admin:org, admin:org_hook, admin:public_key, admin:repo_hook, admin:ssh_signing_key, notifications, project, repo, user, workflow, write:discussion
